_comment: Published fatigue crack growth constants with provenance. US-customary entries are in in/cycle and ksi*sqrt(in) exactly as printed in the source; the loader converts to SI. None of this is design data; consult the source and your own basis before using in anything that flies.

ti-6al-4v-ac33.14.name: Ti-6Al-4V, generic average air data (AC 33.14-1 calibration test case)
ti-6al-4v-ac33.14.source: FAA AC 33.14-1 (2001), Appendix 1, p. A1-2; Paris fit from MCIC-HB-01R Damage Tolerant Design Handbook (Dec 1983) p. 411.257, Fig. 4.113.104. da/dN in m/cycle, dK in MPa sqrt(m), R = 0 data, no stress ratio correction.

2024-t3-sheet-lt.name: 2024-T3 clad and bare sheet, L-T (NASGRO ID M2EA11AB1)
2024-t3-sheet-lt.source: DOT/FAA/AR-05/15, Fatigue Crack Growth Database for Damage Tolerance Analysis (Forman et al., 2005), Figures B-4a/B-4b (NASGRO 4.0 fit) and B-5a/B-5b (Walker fit).

7075-t651-plate-lt.name: 7075-T651 plate, L-T (NASGRO ID M7HB11AB1)
7075-t651-plate-lt.source: DOT/FAA/AR-05/15, Figures B-25 (NASGRO 4.0 fit) and B-26 (Walker fit).

2014-t6-sheet-tl.name: 2014-T6 sheet, T-L (NASGRO ID M2AD12AB1)
2014-t6-sheet-tl.source: DOT/FAA/AR-05/15, Figures B-1 (NASGRO 4.0 fit) and B-2 (Walker fit).
